title: The Return of Monte Cristo
writer: Alfred Neumann, George Bruce, Curt Siodmak
actors: Louis Hayward, Barbara Britton, George Macready
plot: Edmond Dantes is falsely accused of a crime and imprisoned. After 14 years ,He escapes and gets great wealth under the help of the Abbé Faria. Revitalised as the name of Monte Cristo,is to destroy the designs of corrupt and evil men.
